title: Incorrect value of max_usage when fetching stats for specific container
body:
**Description**
I am getting incorrect values for memory_usage 
getting max_usage: 18446744073709551615 and limit: 18446744073709551615

I have created a container and the memory stats are not correct in the response of getting stats for a container.

**stats cmd output:**
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/20419166/193210957-ddc2bd36-a253-4aa7-ae3e-197cb2827636.png)

**stats API responses:**
**/libpod/containers/{name}/stats?stream=false**
`"memory_stats":{"usage":602112,"max_usage":18446744073709551615,"limit":18446744073709551615},`
**/containers/{name}/stats?stream=false**
`"memory_stats":{"usage":602112,"max_usage":18446744073709551615,"limit":18446744073709551615},`
**/libpod/containers/stats?containers={'{{name}}'}**
`... "MemUsage":602112,"MemLimit":104857600,"MemPerc":0.57421875, ...`

The output of stats command and get all container stats are correct, but getting incorrect results in the response of specific container.

I have tried changing the mem limits the updated mem limits are reflected in stats commands output and in the API response of get all container stats( i.e.. /libpod/containers/stats).

I have also tried checking for other containers the max_usage and limit of container responses are the same.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run any container

2. start podman APIs

3. check response.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.1.1
API Version:  4.1.1
Go Version:   go1.17.12
Built:        Tue Aug  9 14:04:32 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**


comments.body:
Found that it is an issue with cgroupVersion: v2 i.e.  OCIRuntime crun.

Created two containers `test_mem_default_runtime`( rutime crun) and `test_mem_custom_runtime`( runtime runc) and getting correct mem usage for `test_mem_custom_runtime`.

`podman run -d --rm -it -m 512m --name test_mem_default_runtime busybox`
`podman run -d --rm -it -m 512m --runtime=/usr/bin/runc --name test_mem_custom_runtime busybox`

_SS showing OCIRuntime_
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/20419166/193511962-e908b452-e972-46a3-a978-68c9bdf5b3ba.png)

container/{name}/stats command output:

> curl --unix-socket /run/user/$UID/podman/podman.sock http://d/v4.1.1/containers/test_mem_default_runtime/stats?stream=false
`{"read":"2022-09-30T08:57:48.408924724-04:00","preread":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","pids_stats":{"current":1},"blkio_stats":{"io_service_bytes_recursive":[],"io_serviced_recursive":null,"io_queue_recursive":null,"io_service_time_recursive":null,"io_wait_time_recursive":null,"io_merged_recursive":null,"io_time_recursive":null,"sectors_recursive":null},"num_procs":0,"storage_stats":{},"cpu_stats":{"cpu_usage":{"total_usage":4914000,"usage_in_kernelmode":4914,"usage_in_usermode":4909086},"system_cpu_usage":216374117000,"cpu":0,"throttling_data":{"periods":0,"throttled_periods":0,"throttled_time":0}},"precpu_stats":{"cpu_usage":{"total_usage":0,"usage_in_kernelmode":0,"usage_in_usermode":0},"cpu":0,"throttling_data":{"periods":0,"throttled_periods":0,"throttled_time":0}},"memory_stats":{"usage":53248,"max_usage":18446744073709551615,"limit":18446744073709551615},"name":"test_mem_default_runtime","Id":"1ef4bd5370d9c00efccc22c362b3c943537ea20d7db39bf8b19cb0b03964e6d2","networks":{"network":{"rx_bytes":430,"rx_packets":0,"rx_errors":0,"rx_dropped":0,"tx_bytes":110,"tx_packets":0,"tx_errors":0,"tx_dropped":0}}} `

> curl --unix-socket /run/user/$UID/podman/podman.sock http://d/v4.1.1/containers/test_mem_custom_runtime/stats?stream=false
`{"read":"2022-09-30T08:58:19.095761361-04:00","preread":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","pids_stats":{"current":1},"blkio_stats":{"io_service_bytes_recursive":[],"io_serviced_recursive":null,"io_queue_recursive":null,"io_service_time_recursive":null,"io_wait_time_recursive":null,"io_merged_recursive":null,"io_time_recursive":null,"sectors_recursive":null},"num_procs":0,"storage_stats":{},"cpu_stats":{"cpu_usage":{"total_usage":31904000,"usage_in_kernelmode":15919,"usage_in_usermode":31888081},"system_cpu_usage":217922639000,"cpu":0,"throttling_data":{"periods":0,"throttled_periods":0,"throttled_time":0}},"precpu_stats":{"cpu_usage":{"total_usage":0,"usage_in_kernelmode":0,"usage_in_usermode":0},"cpu":0,"throttling_data":{"periods":0,"throttled_periods":0,"throttled_time":0}},"memory_stats":{"usage":57344,"max_usage":536870912,"limit":536870912},"name":"test_mem_custom_runtime","Id":"f693ce2e51ca6964765b8ab334a362f913e18f290e56c33d88d8387fed681cb2","networks":{"network":{"rx_bytes":430,"rx_packets":0,"rx_errors":0,"rx_dropped":0,"tx_bytes":110,"tx_packets":0,"tx_errors":0,"tx_dropped":0}}}`

We can observe the **max_usage** and **mem_limit** in the above response.
the issue is already fixed upstream with cf2118eab3b736feb8018bcc9f4cdb548b7ab70a
